title: Name the City from its Satellite Image

source.creator: solunaaaa16 (Instagram)
source.note: Private use draft; do not republish the original creator's footage.

hintsFromVideo: Looks Russian with water to the west

questions.review: Minor: a sliver of the presenter's shoulder is at the top edge of the crop. Could re-pick a cleaner frame.

hintsFromVideo: You can see the Golden Gate Bridge
questions.review: Resolved: used clean pre-reveal frame at 0:40 (before the answer caption appears at 0:42), cropped to the satellite band.

hintsFromVideo: On the ocean with a big port
questions.review: Layout differs: satellite shown as a centered card over the presenter shot, not a clean split. Image is recognizable but a tighter crop would help.

hintsFromVideo: Water on both sides with a river through the middle
questions.review: Centered-card layout again; presenter visible at edges. Recognizable.

hintsFromVideo: You can see all the paddies (rice paddies)
questions.review: Resolved: cropped to the satellite band (the 'That's Bangkok' caption sat in the presenter half, so cropping removed it cleanly).
Clean full-frame satellite. Has a small 'Google Maps' watermark at the bottom edge.
